title: grammitis antipodalis
intro: Grammitis antipodalis, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Māori medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Grammitis antipodalis include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Grammitis antipodalis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its preparations and uses are not widely standardized or regulated.
